target_agent.description: gm | player_a | player_b — whose memory file needs the fix.

instruction.description: The concrete edit to make, stated as a plain assertion (e.g. 'Your memory should show P1's HP at 100%, not 40%.'). This field, and ONLY this field, is what gets forwarded downstream.

internal_reasoning.description: DM's reasoning for the ruling. May reference other agents' secrets. NEVER forwarded to target_agent — code must strip this field before writing any fix log.
